name: Siobhán
quote: We used to be teachers. Now we’re counsellors, social workers, and sometimes the only stable adult in a child’s life.

name: Luke
quote: You can tell a lot about a system by the kids who can’t face going to school. They’re not the problem, they’re the evidence.

name: Aoibhe
profession: Mental Health Nurse in Dublin, HSE
quote: We talk about holistic care all the time, but the system is still divided. People fall through the cracks because their body and mind are treated in separate rooms.

name: Mary
quote: Public institutions seek measurable impact, yet lack real-time insight into how people actually experience policies, undermining legitimacy.

name: Naomi
quote: Community and volunteer workers are the invisible infrastructure of the system. We hold together fragile networks that would collapse without us.

name: John
quote: "Donors and funders want to be seen as part of the solution, but reputational motives often shape ecosystems more than real needs".
